calendar.matters: Petition For Termination Of Proceedings And Discharge

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: off calendar
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Moye appeared via zoom for Eric Shumaker (petitioner).

Mr. Moyes stated that he would file the petition within 10 days.

The matter is continued to June 8, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Moye for administrator Eric Shumaker (via Zoom).

The matter was called for status on close of estate.

The Court asked for an update regarding administration of the estate. Mr. Moye reported that there were no assets subject to probate and that a petition to terminate the estate had been submitted but rejected. Mr. Moye stated that a revised petition addressing the filing deficiencies would be filed and estimated that it would be submitted by April 15, 2026.

The Court continued the matter to May 11, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 and indicated that if the petition is filed and reviewed in advance, the matter may be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To Apr-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter E. Moye for Eric Shumaker, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Discussion was held as to whether sufficient notice had been given for the instant petition. Mr. Moye confirmed with the court that Mr. Shumaker is acting under a power of attorney for Mr. Erickson.

The court waived the issue of notice and took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
